title: 004 WORKS in PROGRESS
description:
WORKS in PROGRESS

Moments of Deconstructivism, an afternoon not to be forgotten in the neighborhood of Radio ulica, Moscow. camera: Juri Burak editing: Sándor Gréczi sound: Andrej Batlusky directed by Jürg Da Vaz filmed on site at Radio utca 10, Moscow a handmade Da Vaz production© 1998
